claim: Ghent Altarpiece restoration runs at MSK from May 2 2023 through December 31 2026; restorers visible behind glass Tuesday-Friday only.
quote: During the week, you can see the restorers of the Royal Institute for Cultural Heritage (KIK) live at work, in the studio behind glass. ... the restorers are at work from Tuesday to Friday.

claim: KIK-IRPA is leading the Ghent Altarpiece restoration; the third and final phase covers the five upper panels.
quote: The third phase of the restoration of the Ghent Altarpiece will begin ... the 5 upper panels of the opened altarpiece are transferred to the museum.

claim: Beer Secret runs a private 2-8 person Ghent brewery day with behind-the-scenes barrel-room access at Brewery Huyghe (Delirium Tremens), 4 tastings, Waterzooi lunch and a 45-min boat tour; €185-€350 per person depending on group size.
quote: Private Group: 2 to 8 people ... 1.5-2 hours at Brewery Huyghe with 4 tastings ... explore the brewery's barrel room ... taste the Pink Elephant straight from the tank.

claim: Saint Bavo's Cathedral sells timed 25-minute slots for the Ghent Altarpiece; combo with the AR/VR cathedral tour is €16 adult.
quote: 25 minute slot ... Combi ticket Adoration of the Mystic Lamb + Augmented Reality.

claim: AR glasses in the cathedral's crypt let visitors witness the tumultuous history of the Ghent Altarpiece in animated detail.
quote: With augmented reality glasses in the cathedral's crypt, you can witness the tumultuous history of the Ghent Altarpiece and the cathedral.

claim: De Halve Maan in Bruges offers private group tours by request via info@halvemaan.be.
quote: Private guided tours are possible by request via the email address info@halvemaan.be.

claim: The De Halve Maan XL Tour runs ~90 minutes, costs €26 per person and includes three specialty beer tastings in the centuries-old cellars.
quote: The XL tour takes about 90 minutes and costs 26 euros per person ... three different speciality beers ... brewery's centuries-old cellars.

claim: De Halve Maan operates a 3,276-metre underground beer pipeline beneath Bruges connecting the brewery to its bottling plant — visible in the renewed brewery tour.
quote: The pipeline is 3276 metres long and at its deepest point it runs some 34 metres underground.

claim: Bruges Ballooning operates the only daily balloon flights over Bruges' city centre, with sunrise and pre-sunset departures and a 4-hour total event including champagne after-flight.
quote: balloon flights over the centre of Bruges in exclusive cooperation with the city of Bruges, with daily departures at sunrise and two hours before sunset.

claim: Bruges Ballooning's private flight for two costs €200 per adult, includes 1-hour sightseeing flight and after-flight champagne celebration.
quote: Adults cost €200.00 per person ... 1-hour sightseeing flight ... after-flight celebration with champagne and Belgian beers.

claim: Cantillon's Saturday guided lambic-cellar tours are €13 (1.5h, 3 tastings, online booking required); self-guided weekday visits €9 with no booking.
quote: Guided Tours (Saturdays Only) Cost: €13 per person ... Online booking is REQUIRED ... Includes: 3 samples (lambic, gueuze, fruit blend).

claim: The Royal Greenhouses of Laeken open to the public only from 17 April through 10 May 2026; tickets €7, must be booked online (no on-site sales).
quote: The Royal Greenhouses of Laeken will be open to the public from 17 April through 10 May 2026 ... booked online in advance — you cannot buy them on site.

claim: The Royal Greenhouses are an architectural complex of glass-and-iron pavilions built for King Leopold II, normally closed and only opened a few weeks each spring.
quote: Homepage ♔ Royal Greenhouses of Laeken

claim: DIVA Antwerp's atelier offers public silversmithing weekend workshops and intensive masterclasses at a fully equipped workbench, plus diamond-cutting demonstrations.
quote: DIVA Atelier is a fully equipped silversmithing studio open to everyone. Pros book intensive masterclasses ... beginners dive into weekend workshops and summer courses—no experience needed.

claim: MoMu Antwerp shows 'The Antwerp Six' from 28 March 2026 to 17 January 2027 — the first major retrospective of the six designers, with a meticulous reconstruction of Marina Yee's atelier.
quote: The exhibition runs from March 28th, 2026 through January 17th, 2027 ... MoMu has reconstructed Marina Yee's atelier with meticulous care.

claim: PrivéPrivée in Antwerp is 3-Michelin-star chef Sergio Herman's private kitchen — guests sit at a communal table beside the kitchen, limited opening days.
quote: Coming here is like entering my home ... the most intimate restaurant of the Zeeland chef with limited opening days.

claim: PrivéPrivée's set menu costs €530 per person all-in (champagne, wine pairing, petit fours, coffee); reservations are full ~9 months in advance.
quote: menu ... compiled by Sergio Herman himself, complete with champagne, a carefully chosen wine arrangement ... €530,00 per person including VAT ... fully booked nine months in advance.

claim: Pairi Daiza's 'Keeper for a Day' lets visitors shadow zookeepers, prepare meals for protected species and join their care routines.
quote: Keeper for a Day ... dive into the behind-the-scenes of the park and into the daily lives of the keepers by preparing meals for protected animals and participating in the care they receive.

claim: Pairi Daiza's 'Animal Adventures' offer exclusive close-up encounters with squirrel monkeys, Steller's sea lions, reptiles and giraffes; 2026 reservation calendar opens by waitlist.
quote: exclusive encounters with your favourite animals ... squirrel monkeys, Steller's sea lions, reptiles, and even giraffes.

claim: Champagne Tour Co. arranges private cellar appointments at prestige houses (Moët, Veuve Clicquot) plus family-grower visits, with TGV options from Paris or local pickup in Reims/Epernay.
quote: private tours of the famous Prestige Houses & family vineyards ... luxury coach or speedy TGV train travel from Paris or local pick up in Reims, Epernay.

claim: Context Travel runs small-group/private Rijksmuseum tours led by PhD/MA art historians.
quote: Rijksmuseum Private Tour ... PhD and MA-level guides.

claim: Ghent → Reims by train: ~2½h fastest (typical 3h+), 2 changes, 16 trains/day; ~125 mi (201 km).
quote: The distance between Ghent and Reims is 125 miles (201 km) ... fastest travel times of around 3 hours ... around 16 trains per day.

claim: From Brussels Midi: Paris ~1h22 by Eurostar, London ~2h, Amsterdam ~1h53, Cologne ~1h47.
quote: Paris, France, is just 1 hour and 30 minutes away via Eurostar. High-speed Eurostar trains run from Brussels Midi to London St Pancras every couple of hours or so taking 2 hours.

claim: Touché Experience offers hands-on falconry sessions in Belgium where you tie the falconer's knot and fly raptors and owls to your gauntlet.
quote: you ... independently fly the raptors and owls to your falconer's gauntlet ... teaching you the famous falconer's knot.

claim: A guided 1960s Citroën 2CV experience runs through the Flemish Ardennes south of Ghent, departing from Beertegemstraat 73.
quote: discover the stunning Flemish Ardennes in an original Citroën 2CV ... meeting point is at Beertegemstraat 73.

claim: Trappist breweries (Westvleteren, Westmalle, Rochefort, Orval, Achel, Chimay) do not allow visitors inside the brewing facilities; access is limited to in-abbey cafés or visitor centres.
quote: the monasteries that brew Trappist beers like Westvleteren don't allow visitors, and you can't visit the monasteries nor tour the breweries.

claim: Eurostar Brussels-London takes 2h17 with multiple daily departures; Premier class adds business-lounge access and at-seat hot meals.
quote: The Eurostar train journey takes two hours and 17 minutes between London and Brussels.

claim: By rail from Brussels Midi: Ghent ~30 min, Bruges ~1h, Antwerp ~45 min, all under €10 with the standard SNCB tariff.
quote: trains taking you to each of them in less than one hour and for under 10 euros.

claim: The 1432 Adoration of the Mystic Lamb by the Van Eyck brothers is on permanent display at St Bavo's; the lower five panels are visible during the upper-panel restoration.
quote: The Ghent Altarpiece | Saint Bavo's cathedral Ghent

claim: The Atomium spheres rent for private events sized 50, 80, 100, 200 or up to 500 people across all five spheres.
quote: five hire options available, including a lateral sphere accommodating 200 people, two areas in the central sphere for 100 and 50 people, the upper sphere/panorama for 80 people, and the whole of the Atomium with all 5 spheres including the panorama for up to 500 people.
